prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AOPMTSFGP-SML-GRY Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 2 Inch Precious Metal Testing Stone for Gold Panning Description: The ASR Outdoor Testing Stone is an essential tool for gold panning. It will help you determine whether the metal you've found is precious or not.

In addition to determining whether a metal is precious or not, this stone can also test for karat content. It is meant to be used with testing solution and needles (not included). The stone itself is 2" x 1.5" x .25", and is a necessary tool for jewelry makers and hobbyists as well. Make sure to add one of these to your gold rush kit or jewelry making tools. Search Terms: gold panning pan rush equipment kit Features: - ASR Outdoor Testing Stone: Identifies Precious Metals & Karat Content - Use with Testing Solution & Needles (Not Included) - Dimensions: 2" x 1.5" x .25" - Necessary Tool for Gold Panning, Jewelry Makers & Metal Workers - Made in India === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2 Inch Precious Metal Testing Stone

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2-in Precious Metal Testing Stone

anthropic.title_differentiation: Identifies Gold And Precious Metals, Tests Karat Content, Gold Panning Tool, Jewelry Makers, 2 X 15 Inches

openai.title_differentiation: Tests Precious Metals And Karat Content, Use With Solution And Needles, 2-Inch By 15-Inch By 25-Inch
